StartupVerse is the professional ecosystem combining LinkedIn-style networking, AI founder matchmaking, fundraising CRM, real-time messaging, and a startup job board.

Platform features

Everything you need to build,
fund, and grow

Eight integrated modules that replace 10+ separate tools — purpose-built for the startup ecosystem.

Professional Networking

Profiles, followers, connections, posts, reactions, comments, and saved content — the LinkedIn-style graph for startups.

Founder Matchmaking

AI-powered compatibility scoring across industry, skills, location, startup stage, commitment level, and goals.

Fundraising CRM

Funding rounds, investor pipeline, deal room flows, watchlists, meeting notes, and stage tracking — all in one place.

Realtime Messaging

Supabase Realtime-powered chat with typing indicators, seen status, emoji reactions, and file uploads.

Startup Profiles

Rich company pages with team, funding history, open jobs, posts, and metrics — verifiable and discoverable.

Investor Dashboard

Portfolio management, deal flow kanban, watchlist, and meeting history — purpose-built for capital allocators.

Events & Communities

Virtual and in-person events with RSVP, community groups by industry, stage, and geography.

Jobs & Hiring

Equity-first job board natively integrated with startup profiles. Apply, track, and hire within the ecosystem.

hiring, and launching

Pricing

Simple, transparent pricing

Start free. Upgrade as you grow.

Free

$0/forever

Perfect for exploring the ecosystem

  • ✓Full profile
  • ✓Feed & discovery
  • ✓5 connections/month
  • ✓Basic messaging

Founder Pro

$29/per month

For active founders building and raising

  • ✓Unlimited connections
  • ✓Match AI scoring
  • ✓Fundraising CRM
  • ✓Investor outreach
  • ✓Priority search ranking
  • ✓Startup profile page

Investor Pro

$49/per month

For active investors deploying capital

  • ✓Deal flow dashboard
  • ✓Startup watchlist
  • ✓Pipeline Kanban
  • ✓Meeting notes
  • ✓Portfolio tracking
  • ✓Founder introductions

Startup Pro

$99/per month

For teams raising and hiring at scale

  • ✓Everything in Founder Pro
  • ✓Team management
  • ✓Unlimited job posts
  • ✓Verified badge
  • ✓Featured placement
  • ✓Analytics dashboard
FAQ

Frequently asked questions

Can founders raise directly on StartupVerse?

Yes. Founders can create funding rounds, set targets and valuations, and track investor interest through our pipeline CRM. Investors can express interest, schedule meetings, and move through deal stages.

How does the founder matchmaking algorithm work?

Our AI analyzes industry alignment, skill complementarity, location, startup stage, commitment level, and stated goals to generate a compatibility score. You can customize preferences to recalibrate the results.

Does StartupVerse support communities and events?

Yes — communities are organized by industry, stage, and geography. Events (virtual and in-person) support RSVP, reminders, and speaker profiles.

Is my data secure?

Authentication is powered by Clerk with MFA support. Data is stored in Supabase PostgreSQL with Row Level Security enforced at the database layer.

Ready to build your startup future?

Join 12,400+ founders, investors, and builders already networking, matching, and funding on StartupVerse.
